---
title: "PromptTrace"
subtitle: "Hackathon · Feb 2026"
---

## Overview

PromptTrace is an AI-driven system that captures and analyzes developer–AI interaction events to evaluate prompt quality and iteration behavior.

**Stack:** Python · AWS S3 · AWS CloudWatch · GitHub Copilot · MCP

## What I built

- Captured and analyzed 100+ interaction events per session using Python and AWS services
- Designed pipelines to evaluate prompt quality, iteration behavior, and developer decision patterns
- Integrated GitHub Copilot and MCP to simulate real-world human–AI collaboration
- Delivered a working prototype under hackathon time constraints

## Skills demonstrated

Structured data processing · Prompt evaluation · Cloud pipelines · Rapid prototyping · End-to-end delivery
